LanguageData.PawnDiaryVsie.Event.BirthdaySummary: {0} threw a birthday party for the colony.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryVsie.Event.FuneralSummary: {0} gathered with the colony at a funeral.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryVsie.Settings.VsieMissing: Vanilla Social Interactions Expanded is not in the active mod list, so nothing is recorded. Your choices below still save.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryVsie.Settings.GatheringsSection: Record these VSIE gatherings as diary entries:
LanguageData.PawnDiaryVsie.Settings.RecordBirthdaysDe: When VSIE throws a birthday party, write a diary entry for it, from the organizer's point of view. Off leaves birthdays to the ambient mood-thought notes only.
LanguageData.PawnDiaryVsie.Settings.RecordFuneralsDes: When VSIE holds a funeral, write a diary entry for it, from the organizer's point of view. Off leaves funerals to the ambient mood-thought notes only.
